principle: A field note is not a post. A field note is an observation.

fieldNotes.title: The System Was Already Speaking
fieldNotes.summary: Failures often appear sudden only because the earlier signals were normalized, explained away, or assigned to the wrong cause.
connections: The System Was Telling the Truth

fieldNotes.title: Compliance Creates Its Own Gravity
fieldNotes.summary: When compliance becomes the center of the system, people optimize for artifact completion instead of risk clarity or operational effect.

fieldNotes.title: Architecture Has a Shadow System
fieldNotes.summary: Every formal architecture produces an informal architecture: exceptions, workarounds, trust shortcuts, undocumented dependencies, and operational habits.

fieldNotes.title: Pressure Reveals Clarity Gaps
fieldNotes.summary: Under pressure, teams do not rise to the quality of their slide decks. They fall to the clarity of their shared mental models.
